productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Wallets
description: You'll be amazed at how many compartments have been cleverly fitted into this cute black purse.  And it's not just practical – it's stylish too - the stitch detailing on the exterior gives a little nod to quilted Chanel bags – the epitome of great fashion style.  Made of 100% polyurethane on the outside with a hexagon stitch design, and 100% polyester liningPress button opening on front flapOne zippered pocket on back of the walletFour card slots and six other compartments insideMetallic logo on frontCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
